joke: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired!
Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why did the golfer wear two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!
Why did the belt go to jail? Because it held up a pair of pants!
Why did the kid throw his clock out the window? He wanted to see time fly!
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the man put his money in the freezer? Because he wanted cold hard cash!
Why did the chicken cross the road? To get to the other side!
Why did the picture go to jail? Because it was framed!
Why did the tree go to the dentist? Because it needed a root canal!
Why did the computer catch a cold? Because it left its Windows open!
Why did the student bring a ladder to school? Because he wanted to go to high school!
Why don't ghosts like rain? It dampens their spirits!
Why did the fish blush? Because it saw the ocean's bottom!
Why did the house go to the doctor? Because it had a window pane!
Why was the library so tall? Because it had so many stories!
Why do birds fly south for the winter? Because it's too far to walk!
Why don't cats play poker in the jungle? Too many cheetahs!
Why was six afraid of seven? Because seven eight nine!
Why was the piano so sad? It was feeling a little flat!
Why did the sailor grab a bar of soap before going to sea? Because he wanted to wash ashore!
Why are doctors always calm? Because they have a lot of patients!
Why was the cell phone wearing glasses? Because it lost its contacts!
Why did the man fall into the well? Because he couldn't see that well!
Why don't people trust stairs? Because they're always up to something!
